heading: Implementation of simplified acquisition procedures
label: 3572 Implementation of simplified acquisition procedures
text: The simplified acquisition procedures contained in the Federal Acquisition Regulation pursuant to shall apply as provided in such section to the agencies named in .section 1901 of title 41section 3063 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3572 was renumbered .section 7222 of this title

Amendments2021— renumbered as this section and substituted “section 3063” for “section 2303(a)”.Pub. L. 116–283section 2302b of this title2011— substituted “” for “section 31 of the Office of Federal Procurement Policy Act”.Pub. L. 111–350section 1901 of title 41
